refnamediv.refpurpose: Plot all elementary boxes with volume b^m

listitem.para: a 1-by-1 matrix of doubles, integer value, the basis
a 1-by-1 matrix of doubles, integer value, the m parameter in the (t,m,s)-net
a npoints-by-2 matrix of doubles, the point set to plot. Default is to plot no point set.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Plot all the elementary intervals with volume b^m. Compute all decompositions d which sum to m. Then plot the elementary intervals in base b with directions d.
If the point set u is provided, we plot it.

refsection.title: Examples
Bibliography
refsection.para: "Random number generation and quasi-Monte Carlo methods", H. Niederreiter, CBMS-NSF Series in Applied Mathematics, No. 63, SIAM, Philadelphia, 1992.
